chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 937 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.3988/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 05.12.2023 Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Shar, Advocate for petitioner along with petitioner. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents No.1 to 3. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents No.1 to 3 has filed a statement and submits that earlier resolution has been revised, and now the retired faculty has been allowed to continue supervision of their already enrolled students, however, no new student will be allowed to get registered with the retired faculty. Petitioner and his Counsel are satisfied, and this petition is accordingly, in above terms, is disposed of along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
